# Universal Dish Structure — Schema Migration & Implementation

## Objective

Implement the universal dish structure redesign: add parent-child variant model to the dishes table, expand dish_kind, add menu schedule_type, add serves/price_per_person fields, update the feed/recommendation engine, update mobile menu view grouping, update admin/AI data entry flows, and update all TypeScript types — so that the platform can represent any dish pattern (template, combo, buffet, experience, group me... [truncated, 11387 chars total]

ts:regen complete — manually updated packages/database/src/types.ts with dishes (parent_dish_id, is_parent, serves, price_per_person) and menus (schedule_type) fields; type-check passes; migration 073 still needs applying to live DB via Dashboard
operator precedence bug in restaurantService.ts:501 — dish.is_parent ?? variants?.length > 0 ? true : false evaluates wrong when is_parent=false; fix: !!(dish.is_parent || variants?.length)
fix: operator precedence bug in restaurantService.ts:501 — replaced ?? ternary with !!(dish.is_parent || variants?.length > 0) so is_parent=false dishes with variants are correctly marked as parents
operator precedence fix verified: !!(dish.is_parent || variants?.length > 0) correctly marks parents; tsc clean (pre-existing error only)

Universal dish structure implementation complete: migration 073 created, all TypeScript types updated, feed/enrich-dish/group-recommendations updated with is_parent exclusion, mobile grouping + filterStore updated, AI scan prompt updated, restaurantService operator precedence bug fixed. Manual step remaining: apply migration 073 via Supabase Dashboard SQL Editor.

## Reason
completed

## Status
All tasks completed successfully.

- Duration: 19m 59s
- Exit code: 0
